displayMetadata.name: KEY INFORMATION
displayMetadata.value:
- get ready, already. want clean, conditioned hair without the fuss?
- this daily shamp-ditioner (see what we did there?) gets the job done in a jiffy.
- made with refreshing menthol and an infusion of argan + jojoba oil, this killer combo cleans + hydrates your hair and scalp in one simple, sensationally scented step.

tags.name: Marketplace
tags.tagLine: You want it, we got it!

metaData.Key Information: Features an ultra-delicate formula with 97% naturally derived ingredients. Designed for fine or greasy hair to remove sebum & pollution particles from scalp & fiber. Provides gentle cleansing action while soothing & hydrating hair from root to tip. Enriched with a potent combination of Edelweiss Native Cells & Ginger Root. Strengthens the fiber for intense resilience to reduce the risk of hair-fall due to breakage. Leaves hair softer, fuller & healthier-looking with a lightweight feel.
metaData.Storage Information: Store in a cool and dry place.

parentCategory.name: Beauty & Personal Care
parentCategory.tagLine: Bath & body, hair care, facial wash & more

tags.name: Marketplace
tags.tagLine: You want it, we got it!

metaData.Ingredients: Water (Aqua), Aloe Barbadensis Leaf Juice, Cetyl Alcohol, Cetrimonium Chloride, Cocos Nucifera (Coconut) Oil, Butyrospermum Parkii (Shea) Butter, Olea Europaea (Olive) Fruit Oil, Sesamum Indicum (Sesame) Seed Oil, Glycerin, Tocopherol (Vitamin E), Fragrance (Parfum)*, Isopropyl Alcohol, Citric Acid, Phenoxyethanol, Benzyl Alcohol, Limonene**, Citral**. *Natural Fragrance **Component Of Natural Fragrance
metaData.Key Information: Free from sulphates, silicones and the harsh chemicals that can dry out and strip your hair and scalp, our Hydrating Conditioner is rich in moisturising Shea Butter, Coconut and Sesame Oils to help nourish, strengthen and repair dry and damaged hair, naturally! An infusion of Olive Oil and Vitamin E add lustre to dull hair and help reduce frizz. Hair is left feeling deeply hydrated, soft and more manageable, while an aroma of Coconut and Lime invigorate the senses! TIP: If you hair is feeling extra dry, drop some of our Certified Organic Rosehip Oil into your finger tips and run through your hair ends.

parentCategory.name: Beauty & Personal Care
parentCategory.tagLine: Bath & body, hair care, facial wash & more

tags.name: Marketplace
tags.tagLine: You want it, we got it!

metaData.Key Information: L'Oral Professionnel Srie Expert Vitamino Color Shampoo is a professional shampoo that offers the optimal way to cleanse the hair and protect the color in color-treated hair. This shampoo will not only cleanse the hair but also help to restore the hydrophobic property of the outer layer of the hair. This is essential for color-treated hair as this hydrophobic property is responsible for maintaining the optimal shine and volume that give the hair a healthy appearance.
metaData.SAP Product Name: L'Oreal Serie Expert Vitamino Color Resveratrol Shampoo

product.name: L'Oreal Serie Expert Vitamino Color Resveratrol Shampoo

metaData.Key Information: Free from sulphates, silicones and the harsh chemicals that can dry out and strip your hair and scalp, our Natural Balance Shampoo combines nourishing Burdock, Nettle and Horsetail Extracts to cleanse and energise the scalp, naturally! Added Baobab Oil helps to moisturise and protect, while adding lustre to hair. A welcomed aroma of Sukins Signature Scent of Mandarin, Tangerine, Lavender and Vanillin refresh the senses!

This volumizing shampoo lightly cleanses with gentle scalp care, giving hair a volume boost, creating lift and body.<

metaData.Key Information: Whether you're lusting after smooth curls, soft waves, or straight, shiny strands, TRESemm Keratin Smooth Shampoo promises up to 72 hours of frizz control.* Part of the TRESemm Keratin Smooth collection, this keratin shampoo packs five smoothing benefits into one system to fight frizz, detangle knots, boost shine, add softness and tame fly-aways. The professional-grade formula is enriched with keratin proteins to help strengthen and smooth, while luxurious marula oil adds softness and shine. The result is frizz-free hair that feels silky and smooth and full of natural movement.

product.name: Tresemme Keratin Smooth Anti Frizz Shampoo

parentCategory.name: Beauty & Personal Care
parentCategory.tagLine: Bath & body, hair care, facial wash & more

tags.name: Marketplace
tags.tagLine: You want it, we got it!

metaData.Key Information: Daily anti hair-fall fortifying serum for weakened hair, prone to falling due to breakage. Enriched with a potent combination of Aminexil, Edelweiss Native Cells and Ginger Root, the serum improves hair resistance to minimize hair-fall and maximize beautiful hair. It helps to re-anchor hair follicle more solidly into the scalp while building the optimal environment for future growth. Day after day the serum sooths and reinforces the natural protective barrier of the scalp. The jelly like texture facilitates the application and avoids any running of the product. Hair is stronger and more beautiful with a healthier look.
metaData.SAP Product Name: Kerastase Paris Genesis Serum Anti-Chute Fortifiant

product.name: Kerastase Paris Genesis Serum Anti-Chute Fortifiant

metaData.Key Information: Gentle cleansing shampoo with mild wash active substances and removing visible signs of dandruff. Supports and protects the acid mantle of the scalp for healthy hair. Stabilizes the hair structure with the pH value of 5.5. Product features: 100-percent soap and alkali-free. Active ingredient Piroctone Olamine ensures the gentle removal of dandruff. Mild wash active substances gently cleanse hair and scalp, removing visible signs of dandruff irritation. Moisturizing and conditioning ingredients revitalize the hair, adding body and shine. Daily hair care stabilizes oily scalp. Indications: For normal to oily hair and scalp. Especially well-suited for the gentle removal of oily dandruff. Dermatologically tested.
metaData.SAP Product Name: Sebamed Anti-Dandruff Shampoo 1L - By Medic Drugstore

Botanical extracts of Burdock, Nettle and Horsetail promote natural lustre and revitalised hair. A blend of Baobab and Sesame Oils add shine to the hair while leaving it hydrated, healthy and silky soft. Feel energised with a burst of Sukins Signature Scent of Mandarin, Tangerine, Lavender and Vanillin!
